caption: A person's hand is seen interacting with a white box of sports cards set against a backdrop of numerous similar boxes. The scene is set in what appears to be a hobby shop or collection room, with stacks of boxes featuring the word "CLEARLY" and "AUTHENTIC" printed on them. The hand enters from the left, touching the side of the white box to move or adjust it. In the corner of each frame, a small inset video shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt. On-screen text and logos accompany this inset, including a stylized red logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.com". As the sequence progresses, the hand continues to slide across the top and side of the white box, shifting its position slightly while the background of stacked card boxes remains stationary.
